text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Four personal toggles, saved per player and kept across restarts.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: alias /bt . click a switch to flip it

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Break one log and the whole tree comes down,

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: drops gathered with the held axe.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Clear the canopy as the tree falls. While on,

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: leaves roll biome themed bonus loot.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Send every drop straight to your inventory

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Replant a matching sapling where the

svg.text: tree stood, on valid ground only.
